'''鈭歡-j-j-m''' ('''kagajemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:find|find]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:find|find]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-j-j-m
|-
! Lemma
| kagajemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigajemoko|thigajemoko]] || [[word:jigajemoko|jigajemoko]] || [[word:shigajemoko|shigajemoko]] || [[word:kigajemoko|kigajemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugajemoko|thuthugajemoko]] || [[word:jujugajemoko|jujugajemoko]] || [[word:shushugajemoko|shushugajemoko]] || [[word:kukugajemoko|kukugajemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugajemoko|thugajemoko]] || [[word:jugajemoko|jugajemoko]] || [[word:shugajemoko|shugajemoko]] || [[word:kugajemoko|kugajemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugajemoko|thugajemoko]] || [[word:jugajemoko|jugajemoko]] || [[word:shugajemoko|shugajemoko]] || [[word:kugajemoko|kugajemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegajemoko|thegajemoko]] || [[word:jegajemoko|jegajemoko]] || [[word:shegajemoko|shegajemoko]] || [[word:kegajemoko|kegajemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogajemoko|thothogajemoko]] || [[word:jojogajemoko|jojogajemoko]] || [[word:shoshogajemoko|shoshogajemoko]] || [[word:kokogajemoko|kokogajemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogajemoko|thogajemoko]] || [[word:jogajemoko|jogajemoko]] || [[word:shogajemoko|shogajemoko]] || [[word:kogajemoko|kogajemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogajemoko|thogajemoko]] || [[word:jogajemoko|jogajemoko]] || [[word:shogajemoko|shogajemoko]] || [[word:kogajemoko|kogajemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gajemoko|th忙gajemoko]] || [[word:j忙gajemoko|j忙gajemoko]] || [[word:sh忙gajemoko|sh忙gajemoko]] || [[word:k忙gajemoko|k忙gajemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagajemoko|thathagajemoko]] || [[word:jajagajemoko|jajagajemoko]] || [[word:shashagajemoko|shashagajemoko]] || [[word:kakagajemoko|kakagajemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagajemoko|thagajemoko]] || [[word:jagajemoko|jagajemoko]] || [[word:shagajemoko|shagajemoko]] || [[word:kagajemoko|kagajemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagajemoko|thagajemoko]] || [[word:jagajemoko|jagajemoko]] || [[word:shagajemoko|shagajemoko]] || [[word:kagajemoko|kagajemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
